rule: Never display raw file names or CSV names in the user-facing app. Use labels like Updated fixtures, Qualified teams, Key player guide, Stats lens.
Fan-facing key players and match summaries must use key_players_curated_v4 and country_story_profiles_v4 before any raw statistical dataset.
Expected XI must come from expected_xi_curated_v4 if available. It is fan-curated and not official. Do not build expected XI from raw form scores alone.
Country Radar should list curated key players and expected XI first. Raw stats players belong only in Stats Lens, clearly labelled.
Show Club Watch matchup cards only from club_matchup_watch_curated_v4. If no curated matchup exists, show no major curated matchup available instead of generating random names.
Planner defaults to chronological kickoff order. Sorting reset must return to chronological order.
Comparison lives only in Player Watchlist unless a same-page radar is provided. Remove comparison checkboxes elsewhere.
